diagrams.title: Resource Allocation Graph with Deadlock
diagrams.description: Shows a cycle of processes waiting for resources held by each other
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how circular waiting leads to deadlock in RAG

diagrams.title: Wait-for Graph
diagrams.description: Simplified representation showing process-to-process waiting relationships
elements: Edge P1→P2 (P1 waiting for resource held by P2)
Edge P2→P3 (P2 waiting for resource held by P3)
Edge P3→P1 (P3 waiting for resource held by P1)
diagrams.purpose: Used in deadlock detection - cycle means deadlock exists

diagrams.title: Banker's Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision process for granting resource requests
diagrams.purpose: Shows step-by-step process of Banker's Algorithm for deadlock avoidance
